title: BiterFighter
description: This Flask application provides AI-assisted diagnosis and treatment guidance for bug bites, combining image classification with personalized recommendations using an LLM (Ollama via LangChain).

title: Wildfire-Risk-Predictor
description: Predicts wildfire risk using weather API call and computationally-cheap computer vision.

title: blurBS
description: RAG-LLM based fact-checking for medically factual browsing.

title: Bankruptcy
description: Finds business metrics that forewarn of bankruptcy using data analysis in Jupyter Notebooks.

title: GoalWarning
description: Program that records audio stream volume amplitude and sends email warning of a potential goal-scoring opportunity in football/soccer when afk.

title: Power-Outage-Economic-Analysis
description: DSC 80 Final Project: Data analysis on the economic impacts of power outages.

title: cityairwatch
description: Built ETL pipelines for tracking and analyzing air quality using Python.

title: LinkedOut
description: SDSU Hackathon project (CAKE) developed in Python.

title: soccermatics
description: Forked exploration of mathematical modeling in soccer. Documentation available on ReadTheDocs.

title: Portfolio Website
